description: GoAway is a lightweight DNS sinkhole that blocks ads, trackers, and malicious domains at the network level. It provides a web-based admin dashboard for management and supports customizable blocking rules with real-time statistics tracking.
tagline: Lightweight DNS sinkhole for blocking ads and trackers
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
Visit the community post for setup instructions and community support:
https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/t/added-goaway-to-bigbearcasaos/4085

title: GoAway
